basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode Software Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) has published the Software Engineer (PHP) Notification 2026 under Advt. No. C-55/2026-IIMK.HR. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Software Engineer (PHP) position. Candidates up to 30 years of age and holding a B.Tech, BE, MCA, M.Sc, M.Tech, MS in Software Systems, BCA, B.Sc, or Diploma in the relevant discipline with the required experience are eligible to apply online through the official IIM Kozhikode website. The application process is currently active and will remain open until 02 August 2026. Candidates can access the official no

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech (CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE) / BE(CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE) / MCA / M.Sc / M. Tech (CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE) or MS in Software Systems or equivalent with minimum 2 years experience, BCA, BSc(CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE)/ Three-year full-time Diploma in (CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE) or equivalent with minimum 3 years experience
qualification.details: Software Engineer (PHP): B.Tech (CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE) / BE(CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE) / MCA / M.Sc / M. Tech (CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE) or MS in Software Systems or equivalent. Minimum 2 years' relevant post qualification experience in Software Development OR IT System Projects OR Website Development OR Mobile Application Development etc. BCA, BSc(CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE)/ Three-year full-time Diploma in (CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE) or equivalent. Minimum 3 years' relevant post-qualification experience in Software Development OR IT System Projects OR Website Development OR Mobile Application Development etc. Experience in complete lifecycle of web application development. Experience as a full stack developer/mobile app developer. Desirable: Proficient in deployment tools like VS Code or Netbeans; Proficient in application stacks/frameworks like Laravel, CodeIgnitor, LAMP etc.; Familiarity with front-end technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript); Knowledge of RESTful APIs and integration with third-party services; Experience with JavaScript frameworks like jQuery.

salary_details.details: Rs. 35300 Per Month (including Rs. 300/- towards telephone allowance)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Software Engineer Vacancy 2026 Details
IIM Kozhikode Software Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Software Engineer (PHP): B.Tech (CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE) / BE(CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE) / MCA / M.Sc / M. Tech (CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE) or MS in Software Systems or equivalent. Minimum 2 years' relevant post qualification experience in Software Development OR IT System Projects OR Website Development OR Mobile Application Development etc. BCA, BSc(CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE)/ Three-year full-time Diploma in (CS/ CE/ IT/ ECE/ EE) or equivalent. Minimum 3 years' relevant post-qualification experience in Software Development OR IT System Projects OR Website Development OR Mobile Application Development etc. Experience in complete lifecycle of web application development. Experience as a full stack developer/mobile app developer. Desirable: Proficient in deployment tools like VS Code or Netbeans; Proficient in application stacks/frameworks like Laravel, CodeIgnitor, LAMP etc.; Familiarity with front-end technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript); Knowledge of RESTful APIs and integration with third-party services; Experience with JavaScript frameworks like jQuery.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Software Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Software Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Rs. 35300 Per Month (including Rs. 300/- towards telephone allowance)

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Software Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIM Kozhikode Software Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Software Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Kozhikode Software Engineer (PHP) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Software Engineer (PHP) position is 02 August 2026. It is advisable to submit your application well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Software Engineer (PHP) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Software Engineer (PHP) post at the Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Software Engineer (PHP) role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.Tech/BE/MCA/M.Sc/M.Tech in relevant disciplines with 2 years of experience, or BCA/BSc/Diploma with 3 years of experience. Specific details are provided in the eligibility criteria section.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Software Engineer (PHP) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Software Engineer (PHP) post is 30 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Software Engineer (PHP) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 35,300 per month, which includes an allowance for telephone expenses.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Software Engineer (PHP) role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Practical Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the type of job offered?
faq.answer: The job offered is on a contract basis for the Software Engineer (PHP) position.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIM Kozhikode located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode is located in Kozhikode, Kerala, with the pincode 673570.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Kerala apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification mentions eligible candidates in Kerala. However, it's best to refer to the official notification PDF for complete details on geographical eligibility.
